name: docx_list
description: Create lists, restart or re-level numbering, and convert paragraphs to/from list items — the abstract-numbering indirection in numbering.xml is handled internally. Get target anchors from docx_read or docx_search first.

anchor.description: Paragraph anchor like 'P12#e7f8'. Single target for ops 'restart'/'set_level'/'convert'.

range.description: Paragraph range like 'P10..P14' to target multiple items instead of a single anchor.

after.description: Paragraph anchor like 'P12#e7f8'. Insert the new list after this paragraph (op 'create').

items.description: List items for op 'create'; 'level' nests multi-level lists.

to.description: Conversion target (op 'convert'): make the paragraphs list items, or turn list items back into plain paragraphs.

author.description: Revision author when track_changes is true. Defaults from environment.
